name: TWO FACED BITCH
description:
Just moments before, they were together on the living room floor, his hands gripping his lover's wrists tightly as their own hands clenched around his neck. He had felt the world starting to go dark, his lungs burning for air, when their parents' timely phone call had interrupted their moment, which caused them to finally let go. Seizing the distraction, he had instinctively inhaled deeply, filling his lungs with much-needed oxygen.
